summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date - latest date only for each APU

output_fields.name: value
output_fields.description: CT5ATP value representing APU health metric

transformations: Join rotables table with rotables_trend table on psn field
Join result with aircraft table on ac_registr field to filter by aircraft type
For each APU (identified by psn), select only the row with the maximum ref_date value
Filter rotables_trend records where trend_type equals 'CT5'
acceptance_criteria: Query returns all APUs of type B737NG with their latest CT5ATP health values
Only the most recent reference date is included for each APU
All required fields are populated: APU P/n, APU S/n, PSN, Aircraft Reg., Reference Date, CT5ATP value, and Workorder if present
VDS is created in Engine Folder
Query executes against AMOS Acceptance environment initially, with migration path to AMOS Production upon go-live
Results include aircraft type confirmation that matches B737NG filter
